name: sharepoint-mcp
description: SharePoint MCP server for reading, searching, and managing documents in SharePoint Online

scripts.bundle: npm run build && npx esbuild build/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs --banner:js='const __import_meta_url = require("url").pathToFileURL(__filename).href;' --define:import.meta.url=__import_meta_url
